description: Translate PPL queries to ANSI SQL via PPLToSqlTranspiler, serve through /_plugins/_pplv4 endpoint, and pass 85% of PPL doctests

userStories.title: Cherry-pick PPLToSqlTranspiler into api module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the PPLToSqlTranspiler class available in the api/ module so it can be used by the new endpoint.
userStories.notes: Use git show to extract, not cherry-pick commit (branches diverged). SelectBuilder is an inner class.

userStories.title: Create RestPPLV4QueryAction endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a /_plugins/_pplv4 REST endpoint that receives PPL, translates to SQL, and executes via the ANSI SQL engine.
acceptanceCriteria: Calls PPLToSqlTranspiler.transpile() then forwards SQL to RestUnifiedSQLQueryAction
Returns same JDBC JSON format as /_plugins/_ppl
No fallback — returns error if translation fails
userStories.notes: Model after RestUnifiedSQLQueryAction. Reuse its execution logic.

userStories.title: Wire doctest to use /_plugins/_pplv4 endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the doctest infrastructure to send PPL queries to the new pplv4 endpoint instead of the ppl endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: markdown_parser.py has ppl_v4_markdown_transform() that wraps as pplv4_cmd.process()
test_docs.py creates pplv4_cmd DocTestConnection in setup
docs/category.json has ppl_cli_v4 category listing all PPL .md files
userStories.notes: Copy ppl_cli_calcite file list to ppl_cli_v4. Keep ppl_cli_calcite unchanged.

userStories.title: End-to-end smoke test with where.md
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the full pipeline works by running doctest on where.md through the pplv4 endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 1 PPL query from where.md returns correct results via pplv4
Translation errors are logged clearly (not silent failures)
userStories.notes: This validates the full stack: markdown parse → transform → HTTP → transpile → SQL execute → format → compare.

userStories.title: P0 commands: search, where, fields, head, sort, stats, eval, table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the transpiler to handle basic PPL commands that map directly to SQL clauses.
acceptanceCriteria: PPLToSqlTranspiler handles all P0 commands correctly
Doctest pass rate for P0 command docs is >90%
userStories.notes: These are SELECT/FROM/WHERE/ORDER BY/LIMIT/GROUP BY — should mostly work from cherry-picked transpiler.

userStories.title: P1 commands: top, rare, regex, rename, dedup, join, subquery, append
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the transpiler to handle standard SQL patterns like ROW_NUMBER, UNION ALL, and JOIN variants.
acceptanceCriteria: Run full ppl_cli_v4 doctest suite and record results
userStories.notes: join has 30 examples — largest single command. subquery has 45 examples.

userStories.title: P2 commands: eventstats, trendline, reverse, lookup, appendpipe, graphlookup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the transpiler to handle window functions, CTEs, and recursive CTEs.
acceptanceCriteria: Run full ppl_cli_v4 doctest suite and record results
userStories.notes: graphlookup needs recursive CTE. eventstats needs window functions.

userStories.title: P3 commands: fillnull, replace, rex, parse, flatten, expand, mvexpand
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the transpiler to handle EXCEPT/REPLACE/UNNEST SQL extensions.
acceptanceCriteria: Run full ppl_cli_v4 doctest suite and record results
userStories.notes: Depends on StarExceptReplaceRewriter already on this branch.

userStories.title: P4 stretch: bin, streamstats, chart, timechart to reach 85%
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to extend the transpiler with enough P4 commands to reach the 85% pass rate target.
acceptanceCriteria: Run full ppl_cli_v4 doctest suite and record final results
userStories.notes: Only implement what's needed to hit 85%. Skip if P0-P3 already reaches target.

userStories.title: Finalize: mark untranslatable queries, write report
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to mark TVF-only queries as ignore and document final results.
acceptanceCriteria: P5 commands (patterns, transpose, addcoltotals, fieldformat, nomv) marked with ```ppl ignore in docs
Final doctest pass rate documented in design doc
All changes committed with descriptive messages
userStories.notes: Only mark as ignore if they cause test failures. Don't preemptively ignore.
